title: Leaf Harasin
compiled_truth: Leaf Harasin is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-10-09 to 2002-01-02), Leaf Harasin sent 6 and received 1926 emails, totalling 1932 interactions. Top correspondents: [Shift Portland](people/shift-portland) (4), [Mark Guzman](people/mark-guzman) (1), [Portland Shift](people/portland-shift) (1). Mailbox folders observed: inbox, read.
